task_objective: Merge the version display branch, then harden the SDH-ludusavi backend call boundary, state handling, global operation lock, and root/state documentation.
tests_added: tests/test_service.py invalid state and thread lock cases
design_decisions: Fast-forwarded feat-sdh-ludusavi-version into main before starting refactor-backend-hardening.
Offloaded blocking Decky RPC callbacks to a background worker thread while preserving skipped and failed payloads.
Used Decky settings space for runtime state when available, with a private user config fallback when Decky settings are unavailable.
Ignored invalid state files with warnings and default settings instead of failing backend startup.
Kept compare_recency conservative and documented that _root remains pending real Steam Deck validation.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 44 tests
